name: Never Fail Crisco Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
This pie crust recipe is very good and can be made ahead of time, saving you effort during busy periods like holidays.
Mix together the flour, sugar, and salt. Incorporate the Crisco using a pastry blender until combined.
Add the beaten egg, white vinegar, and cold water. Mix thoroughly with a fork, then gently by hand to ensure even distribution.
Store in the refrigerator until ready to use. It will keep for up to 2 weeks when refrigerated. This yields approximately 4 pie shells measuring 9 inches in diameter. You may also prepare all of them at once and freeze any that you do not plan to use immediately; they freeze well.
